overall.description: A cinematic first-person exploration of a futuristic corporate plaza at night, featuring the iconic Arasaka Tower from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves through a neon-lit plaza with massive holographic billboards cycling through years 2074-2077, showcasing high-end ray-traced lighting and reflective wet surfaces typical of the game's aesthetic.

events.description: main billboard transitions from tactical team advertisement to Arasaka corporation logo
billboard changes to display year 2077 with Arasaka branding

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the plaza toward the tower entrance, observing the changing holographic displays

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying cycling advertisements and years
tall dark skyscraper with illuminated facade and corporate branding
glass entrance to the corporate building with warm interior lighting
horizontal cyan neon strips embedded in the plaza architecture
small manicured bushes in planters flanking the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic plaza at night, dominated by a massive holographic billboard displaying military imagery and the year 2076. The camera moves forward through the reflective tiled surface as the billboard cycles to the Arasaka corporation logo and then to 2077. Cyan neon strips line the sides of the plaza, and the imposing Arasaka Tower looms ahead with its glass entrance visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: building perimeter walkway with accent lighting

events.description: camera begins turning right to follow the building perimeter

agents.ego_description: turning right to explore the side of the building, moving along the perimeter walkway

entered.detail: dark angular building facade with geometric metallic panels
secondary entrance with steps leading up to the building

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right along the building's perimeter, moving away from the main entrance. The side building structure features dark geometric panels with horizontal cyan neon strips. The main billboard is now visible to the left, still displaying the year 2077, while a secondary stairway entrance appears on the right side of the frame.

events.description: moving into darker shadowed area along the building side with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: continuing along the building's right side through a darker corridor-like space

entered.detail: deeper corridor section with overhead covering and distant lights

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper along the building's side into a semi-covered walkway with darker lighting. The side structure now dominates the center of the frame with its horizontal neon strips glowing cyan. The main billboard and tower entrance become visible again in the distance to the left as the camera progresses along the perimeter.

events.description: billboard changes to display year 2074 with cityscape imagery
camera turns left to face the main entrance and billboard directly

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the center to face the main entrance and updated billboard display

entered.detail: manicured bushes in red planters flanking the approach

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to face the main plaza again, revealing the billboard now displaying the year 2074 with a cityscape image. The entrance doors are centered in the frame, flanked by decorative plants in red planters. The side building structure moves out of view as the camera reorients toward the tower's main facade.

events.description: billboard cycles back to 2076 tactical team advertisement
camera begins tilting upward to view the tower height

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance then tilting head upward to view the full height of the tower

entered.detail: glowing red circular corporate logo with three diamond shapes above the entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the entrance as the billboard cycles back to the 2076 tactical advertisement. The camera approaches the glass doors flanked by plants, then begins tilting upward. The red glowing Arasaka corporate logo becomes visible above the entrance as the camera looks up the tower's facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical tower facade looking upward toward spire

events.description: view transitions from plaza level to vertical tower ascent perspective
billboard content changes to show different imagery including a falling figure

agents.ego_description: looking straight up the height of the tower, observing the architectural details and upper spire

entered.detail: upper reaches of the skyscraper with intricate geometric patterns and illuminated sections

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts fully upward to reveal the towering height of the Arasaka building, showcasing the intricate geometric facade patterns illuminated by warm lights. The red Arasaka logo glows prominently on the building's face while the billboard shifts to display various images including a man with sunglasses and a figure falling. The perspective emphasizes the immense scale of the corporate tower against the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit corporate plaza that transitions from a wide architectural exploration into a towering vertical ascent. It begins by gliding across reflective tiles toward the imposing Arasaka Tower, while a massive holographic billboard cycles through military imagery and the years 2076 and 2077. As the camera veers right, the view shifts along the building's perimeter, passing dark geometric panels and cyan neon strips before entering a semi-covered walkway. The scene then reorients back toward the main plaza and its red planters, moving closer to the glass entrance as the billboard shifts to a 2074 cityscape and then back to a tactical advertisement. Finally, the camera tilts sharply upward from the entrance to reveal the immense scale of the tower's illuminated facade and the glowing red corporate logo against the dark night sky.
